mechanism: The doom loop is one pathway to fiscal dominance: if term premium rises force the central bank to intervene to maintain sovereign debt sustainability, monetary policy becomes subordinated to fiscal needs. The doom loop accelerates progression through the 5-signal fiscal dominance sequence.
regime_dependence: Japan reached fiscal dominance gradually (decades); UK/Truss attempted to skip ahead and triggered crisis. The U.S. pathway depends on whether the loop activates gradually or suddenly.
